conjectures.title: SRFI-1 fold and Racket foldl use (element accumulator) order while all others use (accumulator element)
conjectures.hypothesis: Lambda argument order is the primary source of bugs when porting Horner between Lisp dialects

conjectures.title: Horner encode/decode is a fold/unfold duality
conjectures.hypothesis: For any base > 1 and coefficients in [0,base), decode(encode(coeffs, base), base, len(coeffs)) = coeffs — verified in TLA+ and Lean4

conjectures.title: Alloy bounded model checking needs wider integer bitwidth for Horner roundtrip
conjectures.hypothesis: 6-bit Alloy integers overflow for base >= 8; 8-bit suffices for bases < 8 with sequences up to length 3
